title: Gold rallies at Fed hints at rate cuts
section_path: Gold rallies at Fed hints at rate cuts
section_path_text: Gold rallies at Fed hints at rate cuts
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Markets were steady ahead of the FOMC meeting. Industrial metals fell on weak Chinese economic data. However, energy markets rebounded following further drawdowns in inventories.
